narrative: Strait of Hormuz closure risk eases — crude bid unwinds, pressuring AUD, CAD, NOK into the Tokyo open. EUR/USD closed Friday at 1.1767; ECB hold removes near-term downside risk but Fed-ECB 175bp differential caps upside. USD/JPY closed Friday at 158.58; watch for BoJ meeting on 28 Apr for hawkish surprise, pressuring USD/JPY.
